ItacPersonItem.Notes: Leonardo Orlandini became President of the Accesi Academy in Palermo. For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Angeli Felicella, Palermo, Vol.II, p. 14 (BL Shelfmark: 610.m.10.) Portrait from Leonardo Orlandini, Trapani, Palermo, 1605 (BL Shelfmark: 172.b.31.).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
